CustomField.description: Callouts usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsCalloutsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsCalloutsConsumed__c / LimitsCalloutsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.Callouts.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsCalloutsConsumed__c / LimitsCalloutsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.Callouts.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsCalloutsConsumed__c / LimitsCalloutsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsCalloutsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsCalloutsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Callouts usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Callouts
